title: epidendrum lezlieae
intro: Epidendrum lezlieae, also known as the Epidendrum orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Epidendrum lezlieae have been studied, and it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infection. In herbal preparations, Epidendrum lezlieae is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves that can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
